output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q191762 ; wdt:P1078 wd:Q515543 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
